subject: No root access to portal MariaDB database
commit_message:
No root access to portal MariaDB database

Currently root user is a default user with access
to MariaDB database used by portal application.
values file changed to make 'portal' a default
user and root removed

Issue-ID: PORTAL-946
Signed-off-by: SandeepLinux <Sandeep.Shah@att.com>
Change-Id: Ib145a656d1226ac71d3dfc6803222bc79661d155
